image:image.image:caption: Lucky Cat Mahjong — Hong Kong mahjong lessons, corporate workshops, and community events in NYC

image:image.image:title: Hong Kong Mahjong Points Calculator
image:image.image:caption: Free Hong Kong mahjong points calculator and scoring guide — count faan, score winning patterns, and learn special hands

image:image.image:title: June 2026 Invitational
image:image.image:caption: Our monthly tournament where our strongest and most deserving players compete. Winner and Player of the Month — Jackie Ho

image:image.image:title: Mahjong at Good Company
image:image.image:caption: A mahjong collaboration with this new dispensary on the Upper West Side.

image:image.image:title: Mahjong at Marathon HK Diner
image:image.image:caption: A mahjong collaboration with authentic Hong Kong comfort food at the LIC Food Hall.

image:image.image:title: June 2026 Monthly
image:image.image:caption: Our signature free monthly community gathering with 300+ in attendance. Sponsored this month by Umami Granola.

image:image.image:title: May 2026 Invitational
image:image.image:caption: Our monthly tournament where our strongest and most deserving players compete. Winner and Player of the Month — Jon Chan

image:image.image:title: May 2026 Monthly
image:image.image:caption: Our signature free monthly community gathering with 200+ in attendance.
